verdict: Strong technical foundations. Brand authority is the bottleneck holding you back from AI search visibility.
summary: Your site scores 82/100 on both technical infrastructure and schema markup — significantly ahead of most agencies your size. SSR on Vercel, 20 JSON-LD blocks, all AI crawlers allowed, llms.txt with full companion file. The engineering is done right.

The problem is entity recognition. At 28/100 for brand authority, AI models can technically crawl your site but don't know who you are. No Wikipedia. YouTube has 6 subscribers. LinkedIn has 1 follower. When someone asks 'best AI automation in Hampshire,' UiPath and Zapier answer instead of you.

The fix is specific and achievable: create a Wikidata entry, fix your GBP categories, launch a blog, get 10+ reviews on Trustpilot, and start publishing on YouTube. Your technical foundation means these changes will convert into visibility fast. Projected score after one month of action: 75/100.
platform_callout: You score highest on Google platforms (AIO 74, Gemini 72) because your schema and technical setup align with Google's extraction patterns. Perplexity (55) and Meta AI (52) are weakest — Perplexity weights Reddit presence heavily and you have none; Meta AI relies on its own ecosystem where you're barely active.

findings.title: No Wikipedia or Wikidata presence
findings.description: The single strongest signal for AI entity recognition is absent. All 9 AI platforms use Wikipedia/Wikidata for entity verification. Without it, AI models lack confidence that Antek Automation is a real, notable entity.

findings.title: Brand authority at 28/100 — near-invisible entity footprint
findings.description: YouTube (6 subscribers), LinkedIn (1 follower), Reddit (negligible), no Trustpilot, no G2. Your technical infrastructure is excellent but AI models can't verify who you are through third-party signals.

findings.title: Google Business Profile categories are wrong
findings.description: Listed as 'manufacturer' and 'telecommunications_service_provider' instead of AI consultant or business automation service. GBP feeds directly into Gemini — wrong categories mean wrong query matching.

findings.title: No blog or resource content
findings.description: Zero articles, guides, or educational content. This limits topical authority, freshness signals, and citability surfaces across all platforms.

findings.title: No IndexNow support
findings.description: Bing Copilot and ChatGPT cannot discover content changes efficiently. A 30-minute fix on Vercel that immediately improves two platform scores.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: The most significant missing security header. Required for enterprise client trust. Configurable via vercel.json.

findings.title: Founder bio lacks substantiation
findings.description: '30+ years in technology' is stated but not evidenced with specific roles, companies, or achievements. Detailed career history would significantly boost expertise signals.

findings.title: Only one detailed case study visible
findings.description: The Deccan Grill case study is excellent. Adding 2-3 more across trades, finance, and operations would demonstrate breadth of experience.

findings.title: Organization schema missing recommended properties
findings.description: No description, email, contactPoint, openingHoursSpecification, or priceRange on the LocalBusiness entity. Easy additions for rich result eligibility.

quick_wins.title: Fix GBP categories to 'AI consultant' / 'software company'
quick_wins.description: Wrong categories mean Gemini matches you to wrong queries. 15-minute fix with immediate impact.

quick_wins.title: Add missing Organization schema properties
quick_wins.description: Add description, email, contactPoint, openingHours, priceRange to LocalBusiness JSON-LD.

quick_wins.title: Add image and knowsAbout to Person schema
quick_wins.description: Tells AI models what Andy Norman is an authority on. Missing author photo weakens trust.

quick_wins.title: Implement IndexNow on Vercel
quick_wins.description: Notify Bing of content changes in real-time. Submit key file and configure API ping on publish.

quick_wins.title: Add Content-Security-Policy header
quick_wins.description: Configure via vercel.json. Start with report-only mode to identify violations.

quick_wins.title: Add speakable markup to About page
quick_wins.description: Only page of the 4 analyzed that lacks it. Consistency strengthens AI-readability.

medium_term.title: Create Wikidata entry for Antek Automation
medium_term.description: Instance of: company, industry: AI, location: Andover, founder: Andy Norman. Then add sameAs link to schema. The single highest-impact entity action.

medium_term.title: Add 2-3 detailed case studies with metrics
medium_term.description: Cover trades (electrician/plumber), finance, and operations. Before/after data, named clients, timeframes.

medium_term.title: Write detailed founder bio with career milestones
medium_term.description: Substantiate '30+ years' with specific roles, companies, and achievements. Link LinkedIn prominently.

medium_term.title: Launch blog with 4 articles
medium_term.description: Topics: How AI receptionists work, Cost of missed calls for UK trades, AI voice agent comparison guide, GEO explainer.

medium_term.title: Set up Trustpilot and G2 profiles with 10+ reviews
medium_term.description: Request reviews from existing clients. AI models weight third-party review signals heavily.

medium_term.title: Publish 5+ YouTube videos with chapters and transcripts
medium_term.description: Demo calls, setup walkthroughs, industry explainers. YouTube has 0.737 correlation with AI citations — the strongest signal.

strategic.title: Build authentic Reddit presence
strategic.description: Participate in r/smallbusiness, r/automation, r/UKBusiness with genuine value-add. No self-promotion. Over time, organic mentions build citation signals. Critical for Perplexity.

strategic.title: Grow LinkedIn to 500+ followers
strategic.description: Weekly thought leadership posts, cross-post YouTube content as native video, tag company page.

strategic.title: Seek trade publication features and press mentions
strategic.description: Local Hampshire press, AI industry publications, small business media. Builds notability for Wikipedia.

strategic.title: Activate Meta ecosystem
strategic.description: Regular Facebook and Instagram content, community group participation. Required for Meta AI visibility.

strategic.title: Pursue Wikipedia article
strategic.description: Once notability criteria met (press coverage, reviews, third-party sources). Would add 15+ points to Brand Authority.
